title: DEKTON 2PCS VDE Insulated Screwdriver Set – Tested to 1000V | EN IEC 60900:2018 Certified | Chrome Vanadium Steel Blade | Magnetic Tips | Anti-Slip Ergonomic Handle | Professional Electrical Toolkit
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: VDE Tested To 1000V – Each Screwdriver In This 2Pcs Set Is VDE Certified To EN IEC 60900:2018 Standard, Ensuring Maximum Safety For Electrical Work. Designed For Professional Electricians And DIY Users, It Offers Reliable Performance On Live Circuits.

Durable Chrome Vanadium Blades – Built With Strong Cr-V6150 Blades That Provide Long-Lasting Strength And Wear Resistance. The Corrosion-Resistant Finish Ensures Reliability, Making This Set Ideal For Repeated Use In Demanding Environments.

Magnetic Tips For Precision – Equipped With High-Quality Magnetic Tips That Securely Hold Screws In Place For Improved Accuracy. Helps Prevent Dropped Or Lost Screws During Electrical Work, Delivering Faster And More Efficient Performance.

Ergonomic Anti-Slip Handles – Designed With Pp & Tpr Materials, These Handles Offer A Comfortable, Non-Slip Grip. The Ergonomic Shape Reduces Hand Fatigue And Allows For Better Control, Making Them Perfect For Long Jobs And Daily Use.

Ideal For Electrical Circuits – A Practical 2-Piece Set For Electricians, Engineers, And DIY Enthusiasts. Perfect For Household And Professional Installations, This Set Combines Safety, Durability, And Comfort, Making It A Must-Have In Any Toolkit.
description: DEKTON 2PCS VDE INSULATED SCREWDRIVER SET – The Dekton 2Pcs VDE Insulated Screwdriver Set Is Engineered For Safety, Strength, And Precision In Electrical Work. Tested To 1000V And VDE Certified To EN IEC 60900:2018, This Set Ensures Reliable Protection When Working On Live Circuits. Each Screwdriver Features A Tough Cr-V6150 Chrome Vanadium Steel Blade, Providing Exceptional Durability And Resistance To Wear. The Magnetic Tips Securely Hold Screws In Place, Reducing The Risk Of Dropping And Improving Accuracy During Use. Designed With Ergonomic Pp And Tpr Anti-Slip Handles, These Screwdrivers Deliver A Secure And Comfortable Grip, Reducing Hand Fatigue And Enhancing Control, Even During Long Tasks. Whether For Household Electrical Repairs Or Professional Installations, This 2-Piece Set Is Perfect For Electricians, Engineers, And DIY Enthusiasts. Combining Safety-Tested Insulation, Professional-Grade Materials, And Practical Usability, The Dekton 2Pcs VDE Insulated Screwdriver Set Is An Essential Addition To Any Toolkit.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Ideal for electrical work up to 1000V, including household repairs, professional installations, and general maintenance tasks.
